description: 轻量 MCP stdio 代理。每个 Claude Code agent 运行一个实例。提供 MCP tools (reply/join_channel/join_conversation/send_side_message/run_zchat_cli) + IRC @mention 注入。V4 简化：移除 fcntl lock。

functions.name: _sanitize_for_irc
functions.description: 替换换行符为空格，IRC 单行协议

functions.name: chunk_message
functions.description: 按 UTF-8 字节数拆分消息，符合 IRC RFC 2812 限制

functions.name: clean_mention
functions.description: 移除 @mention 并去除首尾空白

functions.name: conv_channel_name
functions.description: 将 conversation_id 映射为 IRC channel 名称

functions.name: inject_message
functions.signature: async (write_stream, msg: dict, context: str) -> None
functions.description: 将 IRC 侧消息以 MCP notification 注入 Claude Code

functions.name: poll_irc_queue
functions.description: 将 IRC 队列中的消息持续注入到 MCP 客户端

functions.name: load_instructions
functions.description: 加载 instructions.md 模板并替换 agent_name

functions.name: create_server
functions.description: 创建 MCP Server 实例

functions.name: register_tools
functions.description: 注册 MCP tools：reply, join_channel, join_conversation, send_side_message, run_zchat_cli

functions.name: _handle_reply
functions.description: 处理 reply tool：普通消息/编辑/side channel

functions.name: _handle_run_zchat_cli
functions.description: 执行 zchat CLI 命令，返回 stdout/stderr

functions.name: _start_irc
functions.signature: (server, port, nick, channels, tls, auth_token, queue, loop, on_pubmsg_fn, on_privmsg_fn) -> tuple
functions.description: 在独立线程启动 IRC reactor，返回 (reactor, connection)

functions.name: main
functions.description: 启动 agent MCP server：MCP stdio + IRC @mention 注入
